resume.summary: Motivated B.Tech Computer Science student passionate about mobile application development. Experienced in building cross-platform apps using Flutter and React Native with clean, maintainable architecture. Seeking an App Developer Internship to build user-centric mobile products.

education.school: D.Y. Patil College of Engineering, Pune
education.coursework: Relevant Coursework: Mobile Application Development, Android Programming, UI/UX Design, DBMS, Cloud Basics

technicalSkills.skillGroup: Firebase, REST APIs, SQLite, Git, GitHub
Android Studio, Xcode (basic), Play Console, Postman

experience.title: Mobile App Development Intern — Synapse Analytics Pvt. Ltd., Pune

bullets.bullet: Developed UI screens and state management logic for a Flutter-based internal field-reporting app.
Integrated Firebase Authentication and Firestore, reducing backend setup time by 50%.
Fixed 25+ UI/performance bugs, improving app crash-free rate to 98%.
Built a cross-platform app for event discovery, RSVP, and push notifications.
Used Firestore for real-time updates across 500+ simulated users.
Published a working APK with 4.5+ rating in internal testing.
Built an offline-first expense tracker with category-wise analytics and charts.
Implemented local notifications for budget alerts.
Built a step-counter and workout-logging app using device sensors.
Synced data across devices using Firebase Realtime Database.

certification.title: Programming Foundations with JavaScript, HTML and CSS

achievements.achievement: Selected among 80 students college-wide for the Smart India Hackathon (SIH 2024) internal round.
Received the Academic Excellence Award for Semester 2 with the highest GPA (9.3) in the CSE department cohort of 120 students.
Active contributor to two college-wide technical fests, coordinating logistics and technical sessions for 150+ participants.

extracurricular.activity: Core Member, Technical Club, VIT Pune — organised hands-on workshops for 150+ students (2023–Present).
Technical Blogger — published articles on Medium covering tools and best practices relevant to the field; collectively read 4,000+ times.
Volunteer Mentor, CodeForGood (NGO Initiative) — guided 15 high school students through technology fundamentals over an 8-week programme.
